  ⎿  name                     status  sync_state   materialized_path
          conflict_reason                                           parse_error
     … +12 lines (ctrl+o to expand)

● Let me confirm the details — the valid statuses and what's actually in those files.

  Searched for 1 pattern (ctrl+o to expand)

● Bash(for f in plan-jk-crash plan-tui-polish-cleanup plan-done-crow-cleanup; do echo "=== $f
      ==="; head -8 .murder/plans/$f.md; echo; done)
  ⎿  === plan-jk-crash ===
     ---
     title: "Fix jk-crash: event-loop starvation + TicketRecord footgun"
     … +26 lines (ctrl+o to expand)

  Searched for 1 pattern (ctrl+o to expand)

● Got it — here's the deal. Three plans are off synced, and there are two distinct causes.

  parse_error (2 plans) — invalid status: in frontmatter

  The PlanStatus enum (murder/work/plans/schema.py:25) only accepts three values: draft, accepted,
  superseded. These two files have a status: that isn't one of them, so parse() throws and
  reconcile_file catches it and parks the plan in parse_error (sync.py:189-201):

  ┌────────────────────────────┬───────────────┬────────┐
  │            File            │ status: value │ Valid? │
  ├────────────────────────────┼───────────────┼────────┤
  │ plan-jk-crash.md           │ open          │ ✗      │
  ├────────────────────────────┼───────────────┼────────┤
  │ plan-tui-polish-cleanup.md │ active        │ ✗      │
  └────────────────────────────┴───────────────┴────────┘

  Both look like hand-edits (or imports from an older/foreign convention — jk-crash also uses
  title:/created: instead of the name:/created_at: the materializer writes). The DB still
  has the last good copy of each (both draft); the markdown edits just aren't being ingested
  while the status is unparseable. Fixing is a one-word edit in each file
  (open→draft/accepted, active→draft/accepted) — the next poll would clear it.

  conflict (1 plan) — both sides changed

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
❯ 
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  ⏵⏵ bypass permissions on (shift+tab to cycle) · esc to interrupt
